title: saturating u8 addition
statement: From docs/specpack/semantics.md (scoped arithmetic regimes) and docs/basket/spec-mmio.md register math. Write `fn sat_add(a: u8, b: u8) -> u8` that returns `a + b` clamped to `u8` range using a `saturating { ... }` block (a statement-form regime containing the `return`). Define only the function.
